title: Laban Movement Analysis (BESS)
cues: explicit gait quality with stride rhythm and weight transfer
body effort changes are gradual and intentional

title: Stanislavski Method of Physical Action
cues: action is driven by character objective and intention
movement follows task chain instead of random gestures
each beat has clear initiation and follow-through

title: Facial Action Coding System (FACS)
cues: emotion appears in face and eye timing, not only in body
micro-expression intensity is controlled and coherent across frames
head and gaze movement support emotional state

title: EMOTE model for effort and shape
cues: gesture arc and recovery are visible
timing accents align with emotional beats

title: Multi-character blocking principle
cues: main character has highest motion detail and emotional clarity
supporting characters use simpler complementary actions
background motion stays natural and lower amplitude
